markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into Talon.One's product, strategy, and content priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Focus:** Prioritize Retail, QSR, and Grocery. Retail needs updates, QSR needs foundational content (blogs/e-books), and Grocery needs to leverage its strong logos to win new enterprise accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [**Product Framework:** The new framework (Loyalty, Offer Mgmt, Personalized Promos) guides prospects from basic governance to advanced, profit-driving strategies, all under the "Incentives Marketing" umbrella.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Partnerships:** Content must feature T1 tech partners (Braze, Shopify, Adobe) to solidify Talon.One's position in modern tech stacks and attract prospects undergoing digital transformation.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=2314.0)
  - [**Customer Acquisition:** The 60/40 customer mix (60% from competitors, 40% from monoliths) dictates two distinct content strategies: one for agile brands and another for large enterprises.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=2545.0)

## Topics

### Product Framework & Content Pillars

  - [**New Framework:** A new product framework (last 4 months) guides prospects from basic to advanced use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Content Pillars:**](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
      - [**Loyalty Management:** Gamification is a key theme.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [**Offer Management:** Basic governance for enterprise clients with thousands of SKUs.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
          - [**Goal:** Save time and centralize offer management.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
          - [**Use Case:** A "foot in the door" for clients with chaotic promotions.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Personalized Promotions:** Advanced, event-triggered offers (e.g., churn-based discounts).](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
          - [**Goal:** Drive profit margins.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
          - [**Requires:** Integration with a Customer Engagement Platform (CEP).](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Talon.One Predict:** AI for recommending optimal offers.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
          - [**Status:** In development; not a current content priority.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [**Incentives Marketing:** The unifying concept. Content must educate prospects on combining loyalty and promotions, often by "firewalling" promotions behind the loyalty program.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)

### Industry Prioritization & Content Gaps

  - [**Top 3 Priorities:** Retail & E-commerce, QSR & Dining, and Grocery.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
      - [**Rationale:** These industries represent the majority of clients and prospects.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
      - [**Retail:** Strongest presence, but content needs updating.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
      - [**QSR:** Strong case studies (e.g., Joe and the Juice), but needs foundational content (blogs, e-books).](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
      - [**Grocery:** Strong logos (e.g., supermarkets), making it a key focus for winning enterprise accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=2004.0)
  - [**Emerging Industries:** Financial Services and Travel & Hospitality.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Use cases are highly varied, making messaging difficult.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Focus on specific, proven use cases (e.g., Built Rewards, Trainline) rather than broad industry content.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
  - [**B2B:** A broad category with varied use cases (e.g., SiteOne, Carlsberg's B2B division).](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=1861.0)

### Partnership Ecosystem & Customer Acquisition

  - [**T1 Tech Partners:** Braze, Shopify, and Adobe (integration live \~April).](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=2314.0)
      - [**Goal:** Solidify Talon.One's position in modern tech stacks.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=2166.0)
      - [**Shopify Use Case:** Talon.One provides advanced loyalty features that native Shopify tools lack.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=2426.0)
  - [**System Integrators (SIs):** Consultancies (e.g., Deloitte, EPAM) that guide clients through digital transformations.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=2503.0)
  - [**Customer Acquisition Paths:**](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=2545.0)
      - [**60% from Competitors:** Smaller, agile brands (e.g., Gymshark) replacing inflexible solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=2545.0)
      - [**40% from Monoliths:** Large enterprises (e.g., Adidas) undergoing digital transformation.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=2545.0)
      - [**Significance:** This split requires two distinct content strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=2545.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
      - [Deliver a comprehensive content strategy (Airtable) with keyword analysis and topic opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
      - [Develop detailed personas for the top 3 industries (Retail, QSR, Grocery).](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=2057.0)
      - [Present research workflows and tools (e.g., AI deep researcher) in the next meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=2136.0)
  - [**Talon.One:**](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=2123.0)
      - [Provide existing persona documents to inform GrowthX's research.](https://fathom.video/share/LNs4217rADmnBJgiuaUdPsi3sMp4NVso?tab=summary&timestamp=2123.0)
